name: fluentbridge-ai
description: FluentBridge AI — local-first English tutor (Django + React)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n django,react -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n ollama,django,react -c magenta,blue,green "npm run ollama" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
